name: Cue Biopharma, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing a novel class of injectable therapeutics engineered to selectively engage and modulate disease-specific T cells for the treatment of autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. Unlike conventional approaches that broadly activate the immune system, our Immuno-STAT platform is designed to selectively modulate disease-relevant T cells, enhancing efficacy while minimizing off-target effects.
